# Policy & Prompt Governance (CONCEPT:OS-5.1)

# [Topological Session Persistence](pillars/5_agent_os_infrastructure/OS-5.19-Topological_Session_Persistence.md) (CONCEPT:OS-5.0)

## Overview
Pins the model for multi-turn conversations directly to the SessionNode to avoid mid-thread bouncing.
